TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Macky_Sall, title = Macky_Sall, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Macky_Sall} }

S.FORM: Macky Sall ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Macky Sall, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Senegal ta' misuw hya' ga Macky Sall, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Macky Sall ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Macky Sall, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Senegal ta' misuw hya' ga Macky Sall, aring ryax tay 2 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: maʦ~ʨkj s~ɕall rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, maʦ~ʨkj s~ɕall, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕeneɣal taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa maʦ~ʨkj s~ɕall, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
